'''竏嗷-zh-y-z''' ('''karazhyezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quid|quid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quid|quid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗷-zh-y-z
|-
! Lemma
| karazhyezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirazhyezoko|thirazhyezoko]] || [[word:jirazhyezoko|jirazhyezoko]] || [[word:shirazhyezoko|shirazhyezoko]] || [[word:kirazhyezoko|kirazhyezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
